title: lomandra fluviatilis
intro: Lomandra fluviatilis, also known as the Mat Rush or Swamp Mat Rush, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have a range of health benefits, including reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lomandra fluviatilis include its ability to relieve bronchitis and coughs, reduce inflammation, and treat skin irritations. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
